overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a cyberpunk urban environment at dusk, featuring a prominent industrial tower with '02' signage, elevated highways, and neon-lit billboards. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077, showing wet asphalt streets reflecting mixed natural and artificial lighting as the camera moves through an elevated industrial corridor.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated urban roadway at dusk, with the camera walking toward a prominent industrial tower marked with '02'. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the left, while utility poles and industrial buildings line the right. Two vehicles pass by on the left side of the road as the camera maintains a steady forward pace through the cyberpunk cityscape.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the elevated walkway as a concrete barrier appears on the right. The perspective shifts to look over the edge, revealing a lower street level with traffic lights and vehicles. Industrial scaffolding becomes visible on the right while the '02' tower grows larger ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds beneath overhead metal walkway bridges and industrial scaffolding. Large digital billboards appear on the right side, illuminating the path with advertisements. The '02' tower continues to dominate the center view, growing larger as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera walking past prominent billboards including a large blue 'CIRRUS' advertisement on the right. The road curves slightly left as an intersection approaches ahead. A green water tower appears on the left, while the '02' tower shifts to the left side of the frame. Vehicles continue to pass by on the left as the camera nears the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated urban roadway at dusk, transitioning from an open industrial corridor toward a dense intersection of neon advertisements. It begins with a steady walk toward a prominent industrial tower marked with 02, passing vehicles on an adjacent highway while utility poles line the right. As the camera progresses, the perspective shifts momentarily over a concrete barrier to reveal the traffic of a lower street level before moving beneath a series of overhead metal bridges and industrial scaffolding. The environment then becomes more saturated with light as large digital billboards emerge on the right, illuminating the path while the 02 tower grows larger in the frame. Finally, the camera passes a bright blue Cirrus advertisement and a green water tower as the road curves left, bringing the journey toward a busy urban intersection.
